title: Cannot login – Invalid credentials error
description: User reports being unable to login to the ERP system. Error message: 'Invalid credentials'. Affects 3 users in Finance department.
resolution: 1. Check if account is locked: Admin > Users > Search user > Check 'Account Locked' flag. 2. If locked, click 'Unlock Account'. 3. Reset password via Admin > Reset Password. 4. Clear browser cache and cookies. 5. Ask user to retry with new credentials.

title: Invoice posting fails with error code AP-500
description: Invoice cannot be posted in Accounts Payable. Error: AP-500 Database constraint violation. Affects month-end close process.
resolution: Root cause: duplicate invoice number in staging table. Fix: 1. Run query to identify duplicates: SELECT * FROM ap_invoice_staging WHERE status='PENDING'. 2. Delete duplicate rows. 3. Clear AP temp tables via AP > Utilities > Clear Temp Data. 4. Re-run invoice batch from AP > Batch Processing > Invoice Posting.

title: Payroll calculation incorrect for overtime
description: Overtime hours not being calculated correctly for hourly employees. System calculating at base rate instead of 1.5x.
resolution: Issue in payroll rules configuration. Fix: 1. Navigate to HR > Payroll Setup > Earnings Codes. 2. Find 'OT' earnings code. 3. Set Multiplier field to 1.5. 4. Save changes. 5. Rerun payroll calculation for affected pay period via Payroll > Process > Recalculate.

title: Purchase order approval workflow stuck
description: PO submitted for approval 3 days ago but approver never received notification. PO remains in 'Pending Approval' status.
resolution: Email notification service was down. Fix: 1. Check workflow notification queue: Admin > Workflow > Notification Queue. 2. Manually trigger pending notifications. 3. Restart email service: Admin > Services > Email Service > Restart. 4. Verify approver email is correct in user profile.

title: Inventory stock levels showing negative
description: Several inventory items showing negative on-hand quantities after warehouse transaction. Items: PROD-101 PROD-102 PROD-103.
resolution: Caused by receiving transactions posted out of order. Fix: 1. Run Inventory > Utilities > Recalculate On-Hand Quantities. 2. Review transaction history for affected items. 3. Reverse incorrect transactions: Inventory > Transactions > Find Transaction > Reverse. 4. Repost in correct date order.

title: General ledger not balancing after period close
description: Trial balance shows $4
category: 250 discrepancy after closing January. Debit/credit totals do not match.
resolution: Resolved
created_at: Found unposted journal entries. Fix: 1. GL > Unposted Transactions > Review all unposted entries. 2. Post or void unposted transactions. 3. Run GL > Period Close > Integrity Check. 4. Re-run trial balance report. 5. If still unbalanced run GL > Utilities > Rebuild GL Balances.

title: Sales order cannot be converted to delivery
description: Sales order SO-2024-0891 shows status 'Ready to Ship' but system prevents creating delivery note. Error: Customer credit limit exceeded.
resolution: Customer credit limit was $50000 but outstanding balance was $51200. Fix: 1. Finance > Customer Accounts > Find customer. 2. Temporarily increase credit limit or 3. Get Finance approval to override: Sales > Orders > Find SO > Actions > Credit Override > Enter approval code. 4. Proceed with delivery creation.

title: System extremely slow – report taking 45 minutes
description: Month-end financial reports that normally take 5 minutes are now taking 45+ minutes. Affects all users.
resolution: Database index fragmentation identified. Fix: 1. DBA ran index rebuild script on financial tables. 2. Cleared report server cache: Admin > Reporting > Clear Cache. 3. Increased report server memory allocation from 4GB to 8GB. 4. Scheduled weekly index maintenance job. Performance restored to 3-5 minutes.

title: Cannot create new vendor – duplicate check failing
description: Attempting to add new vendor 'Acme Supplies Ltd' but system says duplicate exists. No existing vendor found with that name.
resolution: Duplicate check was matching on partial name. Existing vendor 'Acme Supplies' was triggering false positive. Fix: 1. Search with exact name. 2. If truly different vendor add unique identifier to name. 3. Or Admin > System Config > Vendor Duplicate Check Threshold > Change from 70% to 90% match.

title: Bank reconciliation items not matching
description: 48 bank statement transactions cannot be matched to ERP transactions. Bank import shows different reference numbers.
resolution: Bank changed their transaction reference format. Fix: 1. Finance > Bank Rec > Import Settings > Update reference field mapping. 2. Re-import bank statement. 3. For already-imported items: manually match via Finance > Bank Rec > Manual Match. 4. Contact bank to confirm new reference format going forward.

title: MRP not generating purchase requisitions
description: Material Requirements Planning run completed but no purchase requisitions generated for items below reorder point.
resolution: MRP planning horizon was set to 0 days. Fix: 1. Manufacturing > MRP Setup > Planning Parameters. 2. Set Planning Horizon to 90 days. 3. Set Demand Time Fence to 30 days. 4. Verify items have correct lead times set in Item Master. 5. Re-run MRP: Manufacturing > MRP > Run Full MRP.

title: Employee expense report not routing for approval
description: Expense reports submitted by employees are not routing to manager for approval. Reports stay in 'Submitted' status indefinitely.
resolution: Approval hierarchy not configured for new department. Fix: 1. HR > Organization > Departments > Find department. 2. Add approval chain: set direct manager and secondary approver. 3. HR > Workflow > Expense Approval > Rebuild Routing. 4. Resubmit affected expense reports.

title: Tax code not calculating on purchase invoices
description: VAT/tax not being calculated on vendor invoices from EU suppliers. Tax field shows zero on all invoices.
resolution: Tax codes not mapped to vendor country codes. Fix: 1. Finance > Tax Setup > Tax Code Mapping. 2. Add mapping for EU country codes (DE FR IT ES etc) to appropriate VAT tax codes. 3. Verify vendor profiles have correct country codes. 4. Test with a new invoice. Existing invoices may need manual tax adjustment.

title: Warehouse scanning device not updating inventory
description: Barcode scanners in warehouse 2 not updating inventory after scanning. Scans appear successful on device but transactions not appearing in ERP.
resolution: Middleware service for warehouse 2 devices had crashed. Fix: 1. Server team restarted WMS Integration Service on middleware server. 2. Verified connection string for warehouse 2 device group. 3. Tested 5 scan transactions – all posting correctly. 4. Added service monitoring alert to prevent recurrence.

title: Customer statement showing incorrect outstanding balance
description: Customer ABC Corp statement shows $15000 outstanding but their account shows all invoices paid. Balance should be $0.
resolution: Old credit memo not applied to account. Fix: 1. AR > Customer Accounts > ABC Corp > Find unapplied credit memo CM-2023-441. 2. Apply credit memo: AR > Apply Transactions > Select invoice and credit memo > Apply. 3. Rerun customer statement. Balance now shows $0.

title: Fixed asset depreciation not running for Q4
description: Quarterly depreciation run failed silently. No depreciation journal entries posted for 47 fixed assets in Q4 2023.
resolution: Depreciation calculation service encountered null value in asset life field for 3 assets causing entire batch to fail. Fix: 1. Fixed Assets > Asset List > Filter by null depreciation life. 2. Update 3 affected assets with correct useful life values. 3. Re-run depreciation: Fixed Assets > Depreciation > Run Batch > Select Q4 2023.

title: Cannot post backdated journal entries
description: Finance team unable to post journal entries for prior period (December). System showing 'Period Closed – Posting Not Allowed'.
resolution: Prior period was fully closed. Fix: 1. GL > Period Management > Find December period. 2. Change status from 'Closed' to 'Adjustment Period' (requires Finance Controller role). 3. Post the backdated journals. 4. Return period to 'Closed' status. Note: Always get CFO approval before reopening closed periods.

title: Duplicate payment issued to vendor
description: ERP processed same vendor invoice twice. Vendor KPMG paid $45000 twice for invoice INV-2024-0234. Duplicate check did not catch it.
resolution: Invoice number had leading space causing duplicate check to miss it. Fix: 1. Immediately void duplicate payment via AP > Payments > Find payment > Void. 2. Contact vendor to return funds or apply as credit. 3. Admin > System Config > AP Settings > Enable 'Trim invoice number whitespace'. 4. Review last 30 days for similar duplicates.

title: Sales commission not calculated for Q4
description: Sales representatives not seeing Q4 commission calculations in their dashboard. Commission reports are blank for Oct-Dec 2023.
resolution: Commission plan period end date was set to September 30 instead of December 31. Fix: 1. Sales > Commission > Commission Plans > Q4 2023 plan. 2. Update period end date to 2023-12-31. 3. Save and run commission recalculation: Sales > Commission > Recalculate > Select Q4 2023. 4. Verify results with Sales Manager.

title: Multi-currency revaluation posting errors
description: Foreign currency revaluation job failing for EUR and GBP denominated accounts. Error: Exchange rate not found for 2024-01-31.
resolution: Exchange rates not loaded for January 2024. Fix: 1. Finance > Currency > Exchange Rates > Import Rates. 2. Import January 2024 rates from finance team's exchange rate file. 3. Re-run revaluation: Finance > Period Close > Currency Revaluation > Select Jan 2024. 4. Automate rate import: Finance > Currency > Auto-Import Setup.

title: Report server out of disk space
description: Scheduled reports failing since yesterday. Error: 'Insufficient disk space on report server'. All scheduled reports affected.
resolution: Report output archive was never purged. Disk was 98% full. Fix: 1. Admin > Reporting > Archive Management > Delete reports older than 90 days. 2. Freed 120GB. 3. Configured auto-purge: Admin > Reporting > Auto-Archive > Enable > Set retention to 60 days. Reports are now running normally.

title: Item cost not updating after standard cost rollup
description: Standard cost rollup completed but 234 finished goods items still showing old standard cost. BOM changes not reflected.
resolution: Cost rollup run with 'Simulate Only' flag accidentally checked. Fix: 1. Manufacturing > Costing > Standard Cost Rollup > Uncheck 'Simulate Only'. 2. Re-run cost rollup for affected item group. 3. Verify updated costs: Manufacturing > Item Costs > Review. 4. Post cost adjustment journals to update inventory value.

title: Customer portal login broken after system update
description: After applying patch 4.2.1 customers cannot login to self-service portal. Error: 500 Internal Server Error.
resolution: Patch introduced breaking change in authentication middleware. Fix: 1. Vendor provided hotfix patch 4.2.1a. 2. Applied hotfix to portal server. 3. Cleared portal session cache. 4. Tested login with 5 test accounts – all working. 5. Notified customers via email that issue is resolved.

title: Budget vs actual report showing wrong figures
description: Q1 budget vs actual report showing actuals 40% higher than expected. Variance appears incorrect for all cost centers.
resolution: Budget period mapping was incorrect. Q1 actuals were being compared to full-year budget instead of Q1 budget. Fix: 1. Finance > Budgeting > Report Parameters > Budget vs Actual > Set period mapping to 'Match Reporting Period'. 2. Regenerate report. Actuals now correctly compared to Q1 budget only.

title: Automated PO not generated for low stock items
description: System should auto-generate POs when inventory drops below reorder point but no POs generated for 15 items that are below minimum.
resolution: Auto-PO feature was disabled during last system upgrade and not re-enabled. Fix: 1. Procurement > Settings > Auto Replenishment > Enable. 2. Set minimum order frequency to daily. 3. Verify reorder points are set on all items: Inventory > Item Master > Check Reorder Point field. 4. Run replenishment manually to catch up: Procurement > Auto Replenishment > Run Now.
